title: Eggless Rasmalai and Mango cakes — Harris Park near Parramatta
summary:
Most bakeries near Parramatta don't carry Rasmalai. Or Mango. Or eggless at all, if that's what your family needs.

At Num Nums Harris Park, none of those are special requests. All 15 flavours are eggless as standard — Rasmalai and Mango included. These come in regularly for birthday orders from Westmead, Merrylands, and Granville families who know exactly what they want and can't find it close to home.

Six sizes from 6-inch to 16-inch. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Any design — photo references welcome.

48 hours minimum notice. Pickup from Wigram Street, Harris Park. Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
